prompt_text: Comet ML vs MLflow pricing and features
response:
# Comet ML vs MLflow: Pricing & Features Comparison

## **Pricing Model**

| Aspect | Comet ML | MLflow |
|--------|----------|--------|
| **Cost** | Freemium + Paid | **Free & Open Source** |
| **Free Tier** | Limited experiments, projects | Unlimited (self-hosted) |
| **Pro Plan** | $49+/month (team pricing available) | N/A |
| **Enterprise** | Custom pricing | N/A |

---

## **Core Features Comparison**

| Feature | Comet ML | MLflow |
|---------|----------|--------|
| **Experiment Tracking** | ✅ Advanced | ✅ Built-in |
| **Model Registry** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| **Hyperparameter Optimization** | ✅ Integrated | ❌ Limited |
| **Artifact Storage** | ✅ Cloud-native | ✅ Local/S3 |
| **Version Control** | ✅ Git integration | ⚠️ Basic |
| **Team Collaboration** | ✅ Advanced | ❌ Limited |
| **Web UI** | ✅ Modern, intuitive | ✅ Functional |
| **API Support** | ✅ REST + Python | ✅ REST + Python |
| **Deployment Integration** | ✅ Multiple platforms | ⚠️ Basic |

---

## **Key Strengths**

### **Comet ML**
- 🎯 Better team collaboration features
- 📊 Advanced visualization & analytics
- 🔧 Built-in hyperparameter optimization
- 🚀 Cloud-native, production-ready
- 📱 Superior web UI/UX
- 🔐 Enterprise-grade security

### **MLflow**
- 💰 Completely free
- 🛠️ Lightweight, easy to set up
- 📦 Minimal dependencies
- 🏢 Strong community & ecosystem
- 🔧 Works well for simple use cases
- 🏠 Full control with self-hosting

---

## **When to Use Each**

### **Choose Comet ML if:**
- You need team collaboration features
- Advanced experiment comparison needed
- Enterprise/production deployment required
- Budget allows for managed solution
- Complex hyperparameter tuning needed

### **Choose MLflow if:**
- Tight budget/open-source requirement
- Simple experiment tracking needs
- Self-hosting preference
- Quick local setup needed
- Integrated with existing Databricks stack

---

## **Summary**

| Factor | Winner |
|--------|--------|
| **Cost** | MLflow (free) |
| **Ease of Use** | Comet ML |
| **Features** | Comet ML |
| **Flexibility** | MLflow |
| **Enterprise** | Comet ML |
| **Community** | MLflow |

**Verdict:** Choose **MLflow** for cost-free simplicity; **Comet ML** for advanced features & team workflows.
